# app-rail

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: App rail: the far-left icon strip that switches the focused tab between apps, deriving its own active-app highlight and chrome theme scope.
- Web:
  - Uses:
    - `apps-core.Apps`
    - `apps-core.useActiveApp`
    - `apps-core/app-icon.AppIconView`
    - `apps-core/tabs.useTabs`
    - `apps-core/theme-scope.useChromeThemeScope`
    - `primitives/css/center.Center`
    - `primitives/css/pin.Pin`
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`
    - `primitives/css/ui-kit.cn`
    - `primitives/tooltip.WithTooltip`
  - Exports (values): `AppRail`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `apps-core/app-rail-framing/rail`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
